content: Emmanuel Macron is the current President of France. He was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, serving as the country's head of state and leader of the centrist La République En Marche! party.
raw_content: Emmanuel Macron is the current President of France. He was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, serving as the country's head of state and leader of the centrist La République En Marche! party.
